comments.body: Possible duplicate of Spring MVC : read file from src/main/resources

answers.body:
You need to use:
("classpath:"+this.config.getClassPathRoot() + "/**/*"+jsonFileExtension)
for getting resources.

I this also not working try using the object by calling the default constructor as: PathMatchingResourcePatternResolver pathResolver = new PathMatchingResourcePatternResolver();

comments.body: it doesn't work. I've got this exception java.lang.IllegalArgumentException: name at this line: InputStream resourceInputStream = resource.getInputStream(); My previous code work on local environment, but when i deploy to server it couldn't find this json file in config folder

answers.body:
try {
        Resource resource = new ClassPathResource("classpath:configuration.json");
        InputStream resourceInputStream = resource.getInputStream();
        if (resourceInputStream == null) {
            log.warn("Configuration could not be loaded from file! Using default configuration.");
            configuration = getDefaultConfiguration();
        }
        else {
            configuration = new ObjectMapper().readValue(resourceInputStream, Configuration.class);
            if (configuration != null) {
                log.debug("Configuration found (using PathMatchingResourcePatternResolver)");
                break;
            }
        }
    } catch (Exception e) {
        log.warn("Configuration could not be loaded from file! Using default configuration.", e);
        configuration = getDefaultConfiguration();
    }

comments.body: bollocs. by default everything in /resources will be included

answers.body:
if your project is maven project, maybe you should add some configuration in your pom.

<build>
    <resources>
        <resource>
            <directory>src/main/resources</directory>
            <includes>
                <include>**/*.properties</include>
                <include>**/*.json</include>
            </includes>
        </resource>
    </resources>

title: Load json file from resource
body:
I have a problem with loading a JSON file from a resource file. Here is my code:

public void setConfiguration() {
    try {
        ClassLoader cl = this.getClass().getClassLoader();
        ResourcePatternResolver resolver =
            new PathMatchingResourcePatternResolver(cl);
        Resource[] resources =
            resolver.getResources("classpath*:/configuration.json");
        if (resources.length == 0) {
            log.warn("Configuration could not be loaded from file! Using "
                     + "default configuration.");
            configuration = getDefaultConfiguration();
        }
        for (Resource resource : resources) {
            configuration = new ObjectMapper().readValue(
                resource.getInputStream(), Configuration.class);
            if (configuration != null) {
                log.debug("Configuration found (using "
                          + "PathMatchingResourcePatternResolver)");
                break;
            }
        }
    } catch (Exception e) {
        log.warn("Configuration could not be loaded from file! Using default "
                 + "configuration.",
            e);
        configuration = getDefaultConfiguration();
    }
}

It always takes the default configuration. Does anyone know why it doesn't take values from the JSON file?
